response.summary: A classic grid-based Snake game where you eat food to grow and avoid hitting the walls or your own tail.
notes: Use Arrow Keys to change direction.
Eat the red food to grow your tail.
Avoid the grey walls and your own green tail.

project.name: Classic Snake
project.description: A top-down grid-based snake game utilizing custom scripts for tail management and grid movement.
